description: Take casual dressing to the next level with this high ankle leather boot from red tape. The full grain leather lends it a natural colour finish that enhances your style quotient immensely.UpperFull-grain leather upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleHigh ankle for enhanced style and better support to the lower legFabric inner lining with a padded collar and tongue for ultimate breathabilityLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsoleErgonomically padded leather footbed for sweat-free comfortPU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with modified herringbone grooves for absolute grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
